title: T3: Implement MetaBox.astro component
description:
Create src/components/MetaBox.astro — a props-driven infobox for canonical key pages.

**Repo:** syllago-docs
**File:** src/components/MetaBox.astro (new)

**What to do:**
Create the component verbatim from plan § T3. It is purely props-driven — no collection queries.

Props interface:
- lastChangedAt: string — ISO 8601 date, formatted as "Apr 11, 2026" for display
- sourceCount: number — unique source URIs across providers for this key
- providerSupportCount: number — providers that support this key
- totalProviders: number — total providers tracked
- issueUrl: string — pre-filled GitHub new-issue URL

Renders an <aside class="meta-box not-content"> with a <dl> containing four items:
- Last verified: formatted date
- Sources: "{sourceCount} across providers"
- Support: "{providerSupportCount} of {totalProviders} providers"
- Report issue: anchor link opening in new tab

Includes scoped CSS using Starlight CSS custom properties (--sl-color-bg-nav, --sl-color-hairline-light, --sl-text-xs, etc.).

See full component in plan § T3 — copy it verbatim.

**Success criteria:**
- bun astro check → pass (exit 0) — component type-checks without errors
- Visual check after T6: MetaBox renders on canonical key pages with all four items and Report issue link

**No dependencies** (can proceed in parallel with all other tasks)
**Plan ref:** docs/plans/2026-04-12-syllago-docs-capabilities-pipeline-implementation.md § T3
close_reason: Implemented: MetaBox.astro created, astro check clean (no MetaBox errors)

title: T8: Extend sync-providers.ts to emit ProviderExtensions
description:
Modify scripts/sync-providers.ts to load capabilities data and conditionally emit ProviderExtensions component sections on provider pages.

**Repo:** syllago-docs
**File:** scripts/sync-providers.ts (modify)

**What to do:**
Make five changes (see plan § T8 for exact code):

1. Add types after ProviderManifest interface:
   - CapDataExtension { id, name, description: string; source_ref?: string }
   - CapDataEntry { id, provider, contentType: string; providerExtensions: CapDataExtension[] }

2. Add CAPABILITIES_DATA_DIR constant and loadCapabilitiesData() function:
   - Returns Map<string, CapDataEntry> keyed by "{provider}-{contentType}"
   - If directory doesn't exist: logs and returns empty map
   - Otherwise: reads all *.json files and populates the map
   - Add readdirSync to the existing fs import

3. Add generateExtensionsSections(providerSlug, capabilitiesData) function:
   - Checks content types in order: skills, rules, agents, commands, hooks, mcp
   - For each type with non-empty providerExtensions in capabilitiesData: adds a ## {CtTitle} Extensions section with intro text and <ProviderExtensions provider="..." contentType="..." /> call
   - Returns { imports: string[], sections: string[] } — imports includes the ProviderExtensions import only if there are sections

4. Update generateProviderPage signature to accept capabilitiesData: Map<string, CapDataEntry>:
   - Call generateExtensionsSections at the top of the function (before building lines[])
   - After the AUTO-GENERATED comment line, push extImports if present
   - Before the ## Detection section, push extSections if present

5. In main(): call loadCapabilitiesData() before the provider page loop; pass capabilitiesData to each generateProviderPage call.

CT_DISPLAY reference (already in sync-providers.ts): map from content type slug to display name.

**Success criteria:**
- bun scripts/sync-providers.ts --local /tmp/providers.json → exit 0
- grep "ProviderExtensions" src/content/docs/using-syllago/providers/amp.mdx → pass
- grep "ProviderExtensions" src/content/docs/using-syllago/providers/cursor.mdx → pass
- bun astro build → exit 0

**Dependencies:** T1 (capabilities data files must exist in src/data/capabilities/), T5 (ProviderExtensions component must exist)
**Plan ref:** docs/plans/2026-04-12-syllago-docs-capabilities-pipeline-implementation.md § T8
close_reason: Implemented: sync-providers.ts enriches provider pages with ProviderExtensions

title: T1: Scaffold sync-capabilities.ts with loader and data-file writer
description:
Create scripts/sync-capabilities.ts — the capabilities sync script skeleton that writes two data collection directories.

**Repo:** syllago-docs
**File:** scripts/sync-capabilities.ts (new)

**What to do:**
Create the complete script as specified in the plan. The script must:
- Mirror sync-providers.ts structure: shebang, TypeScript interfaces matching Go schema, config constants, GitHub auth helper, loadManifest(), data-file writers, main().
- Define interfaces: CapSource, CapMapping, CapExtension, CapContentType, CanonicalKeyMeta, CapabilitiesManifest
- Config constants: ROOT_DIR, GITHUB_REPO, CAPABILITIES_DATA_DIR, CANONICAL_KEYS_DATA_DIR, CANONICAL_KEYS_MDX_DIR, REFERENCE_DIR, FETCH_TIMEOUT_MS, ISSUE_REPO
- getGitHubToken(): checks GITHUB_TOKEN env var, falls back to `gh auth token`
- loadManifest(): supports --local <path> CLI arg and CAPABILITIES_JSON_PATH env var; falls back to fetching latest GitHub release asset
- writeCapabilitiesDataFiles(): clears + recreates src/data/capabilities/, writes one JSON per provider+contentType with fields: id, provider, contentType, status, lastChangedAt, sources, canonicalMappings, providerExtensions
- writeCanonicalKeysDataFiles(): clears + recreates src/data/canonical-keys/, aggregates provider support per key, writes one JSON per key with fields: id, key, contentType, description, type, providers
- main(): graceful-skip if loadManifest fails but prior MDX output exists; calls both write functions; logs placeholder for MDX (not yet implemented, added in T6/T7)

See full script in plan § T1 — copy it verbatim.

**Run with local test file:**
bun scripts/sync-capabilities.ts --local /tmp/capabilities.json

**Success criteria:**
- bun scripts/sync-capabilities.ts --local /tmp/capabilities.json → exit 0
- ls src/data/capabilities/ | wc -l → 57
- ls src/data/canonical-keys/ | wc -l → 12
- cat src/data/capabilities/amp-skills.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d['id']=='amp-skills'; assert 'display_name' in d['canonicalMappings']; print('OK')" → OK
- cat src/data/canonical-keys/skills-display_name.json | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert 'amp' in d['providers']; assert d['providers']['amp']['supported']==True; print('OK')" → OK

**Dependencies:** T0 must complete first (capabilities.json needs canonical_keys field)
**Plan ref:** docs/plans/2026-04-12-syllago-docs-capabilities-pipeline-implementation.md § T1
close_reason: Implemented: sync-capabilities.ts creates 57 capability + 13 canonical-key data files

title: MIDPOINT: astro sync verification checkpoint
description:
Checkpoint: verify collections and components work together before proceeding to MDX generation tasks (T6-T9).

**What to do:**
1. Ensure T1 data files exist (run with local file if needed):
   bun scripts/sync-capabilities.ts --local /tmp/capabilities.json

2. Run Astro sync to verify both new collections validate:
   bun astro sync

3. Run type check to verify all three new components pass:
   bun astro check

4. Spot-check data file counts:
   ls src/data/capabilities/*.json | wc -l   # expect 57
   ls src/data/canonical-keys/*.json | wc -l # expect 12

5. Confirm component files exist:
   ls src/components/MetaBox.astro src/components/CanonicalSupportTable.astro src/components/ProviderExtensions.astro

**Success criteria (all must pass before proceeding to T6/T7/T8/T9):**
- bun astro sync → exit 0
- bun astro check → exit 0 (with all three components in place)
- data file counts match expected values

**Dependencies:** T3 (MetaBox), T4 (CanonicalSupportTable), T5 (ProviderExtensions)
**Note:** T4 depends on T2, T5 depends on T2 — so T2 must be done before this checkpoint passes cleanly.
**Plan ref:** docs/plans/2026-04-12-syllago-docs-capabilities-pipeline-implementation.md (midpoint between T5 and T6)
close_reason: MIDPOINT passed: astro sync clean with 57 capability + 13 canonical-key files and all 3 components

title: T5: Implement ProviderExtensions.astro component
description:
Create src/components/ProviderExtensions.astro — build-time component that lists provider-specific capability extensions.

**Repo:** syllago-docs
**File:** src/components/ProviderExtensions.astro (new)

**What to do:**
Create the component verbatim from plan § T5.

Props interface:
- provider: string — e.g., "claude-code"
- contentType: string — e.g., "skills"

Logic:
1. getCollection('capabilities') at build time
2. Find entry where e.data.provider === provider && e.data.contentType === contentType
3. extensions = entry?.data.providerExtensions ?? []
4. If extensions.length === 0: render nothing (fragment with no output)
5. Otherwise: render <dl class="provider-extensions not-content"> with one <div> per extension showing:
   - <dt> with the extension name (linked to source_ref if present, plain text otherwise)
   - <dd> with description text

Includes scoped CSS using Starlight CSS custom properties.

See full component in plan § T5 — copy it verbatim.

**Success criteria:**
- bun astro check → pass (exit 0)
- grep -c "getCollection('capabilities')" src/components/ProviderExtensions.astro → 1
- Visual check after T8: provider pages for amp and claude-code show Skills Extensions section with the extensions list

**Dependencies:** T2 (collections registered so getCollection resolves)
**Plan ref:** docs/plans/2026-04-12-syllago-docs-capabilities-pipeline-implementation.md § T5
close_reason: Implemented: ProviderExtensions.astro queries capabilities collection

title: T2: Add capabilities and canonical-keys collections to content.config.ts
description:
Add Zod schemas and register two new Astro data collections in src/content.config.ts.

**Repo:** syllago-docs
**File:** src/content.config.ts (modify)

**What to do:**
Add after the existing providerSchema definition (before export const collections):

1. capSourceSchema — z.object({ uri, type, fetched_at: all z.string() })
2. capMappingSchema — z.object({ supported: z.boolean(), mechanism: z.string(), paths: z.array(z.string()).optional() })
3. capExtensionSchema — z.object({ id, name, description: z.string(), source_ref: z.string().optional() })
4. capabilitySchema — z.object({ id, provider, contentType, status, lastChangedAt: z.string(), sources: z.array(capSourceSchema), canonicalMappings: z.record(z.string(), capMappingSchema), providerExtensions: z.array(capExtensionSchema) })
5. canonicalKeyProviderSupportSchema — z.object({ supported: z.boolean(), mechanism: z.string() })
6. canonicalKeySchema — z.object({ id, key, contentType, description, type: z.string(), providers: z.record(z.string(), canonicalKeyProviderSupportSchema) })

Update export const collections to add:
- capabilities: glob({ pattern: '*.json', base: './src/data/capabilities' }) with capabilitySchema
- 'canonical-keys': glob({ pattern: '*.json', base: './src/data/canonical-keys' }) with canonicalKeySchema

NOTE: T1 must have run first so the data files exist for Astro type sync to succeed. Run T1 with --local before running T2 verification.

See exact schema code in plan § T2.

**Success criteria:**
- bun astro sync → pass (exit 0)
- bun astro check → pass (exit 0)
- grep -c "canonical-keys" src/content.config.ts → 1

**No dependencies** (can proceed in parallel with T0/T1 to write schema, but verify after T1 data files exist)
**Plan ref:** docs/plans/2026-04-12-syllago-docs-capabilities-pipeline-implementation.md § T2
close_reason: Implemented: 6 Zod schemas + 2 collections added to content.config.ts, astro sync passes

title: T4: Implement CanonicalSupportTable.astro component
description:
Create src/components/CanonicalSupportTable.astro — a build-time table showing provider support for a canonical key. **Repo:** syllago-docs **File:** src/components/CanonicalSupportTable.astro (new) **What to do:** Create the component verbatim from plan § T4. Props interface: - keyName: string — e.g., "display_name" - contentType: string — e.g., "skills" Logic: 1. getCollection('capabilities') at build time 2. Filter to entries where entry.data.contentType === contentType 3. Map each to a Row { provider, supported, mechanism } — uses canonical_mappings[keyName], defaults to { supported: false, mechanism: "not documented" } if missing 4. Sort: supported first (alphabetical), then unsupported (alphabetical) 5. If no rows: render

No provider support data available for {keyName}.

6. Otherwise: render a table with Provider | Supported | Mechanism columns. Provider links to /using-syllago/providers/{provider}/. Supported column uses ✓ (class support-yes) or ✗ (class support-no). Includes scoped CSS. See full component in plan § T4 — copy it verbatim. **Success criteria:** - bun astro check → pass (exit 0) - grep -c "getCollection('capabilities')" src/components/CanonicalSupportTable.astro → 1 - Visual check after T6: table shows providers sorted supported-first with checkmarks/crosses **Dependencies:** T2 (collections registered so getCollection('capabilities') resolves) **Plan ref:** docs/plans/2026-04-12-syllago-docs-capabilities-pipeline-implementation.md § T4
close_reason: Implemented: CanonicalSupportTable.astro queries capabilities collection

title: T0: Bundle canonical_keys in _gencapabilities
description:
Add canonical_keys metadata to the _gencapabilities Go command output so sync-capabilities.ts can consume it.

**Repo:** /home/hhewett/.local/src/syllago
**File:** cli/cmd/syllago/gencapabilities.go

**What to do:**
1. Add YAML input structs: canonicalKeysYAML (top-level) and canonicalKeyEntryYAML (per-key entry with description + type fields).
2. Add JSON output struct: CanonicalKeyMeta { Description string json:"description"; Type string json:"type" }
3. Add CanonicalKeys field to CapabilitiesManifest: CanonicalKeys map[string]map[string]CanonicalKeyMeta json:"canonical_keys"
4. Add canonicalKeysSpecPath var pointing to ../docs/spec/canonical-keys.yaml (overridable in tests).
5. Add loadCanonicalKeys(specPath string) function that reads and parses the YAML, building a map of contentType → keyName → CanonicalKeyMeta.
6. In runGencapabilities: call loadCanonicalKeys(canonicalKeysSpecPath) and set manifest.CanonicalKeys before encoding.

See full code in plan § T0 for exact struct definitions and function bodies.

**Success criteria:**
- make build → pass (exit 0)
- syllago _gencapabilities | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert 'canonical_keys' in d; assert 'skills' in d['canonical_keys']; assert 'display_name' in d['canonical_keys']['skills']; print('OK')" → OK
- syllago _gencapabilities | python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load(sys.stdin); k=d['canonical_keys']['skills']['display_name']; assert k['type']=='string'; assert len(k['description'])>10; print('OK')" → OK

title: T10: End-to-end validation
description:
Run the full capabilities pipeline end-to-end and verify all design doc success criteria.

**Repo:** syllago-docs
**Prereqs:** T6, T7, T8, T9 all complete

**Step 1: Full sync run**
CAPABILITIES_JSON_PATH=/tmp/capabilities.json bun run sync
(All five sync scripts run in order; sync-capabilities.ts uses the local file via env var)

**Step 2: Astro build**
bun run build 2>&1 | tee /tmp/build-output.txt
echo "Exit: $?"

**Step 3: Dev server spot-check**
bun run dev &
DEV_PID=$!
sleep 5
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:4321/reference/capabilities-matrix/ ; echo
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:4321/reference/canonical-keys/display-name/ ; echo
curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" http://localhost:4321/using-syllago/providers/amp/ ; echo
kill $DEV_PID

**Step 4: Update CHANGELOG.md**
Add entry under today's date (2026-04-12):
### Added
- Canonical key reference pages at /reference/canonical-keys/<key>/ — one page per canonical frontmatter key, showing provider support, mechanism details, and a pre-filled issue report link.
- Capabilities matrix page at /reference/capabilities-matrix/ — cross-provider support grid linking to canonical key detail pages.
- Provider Extensions sections on provider pages for providers that define capabilities beyond the canonical key set.

**Full success criteria checklist:**
1. bun scripts/sync-capabilities.ts --local /tmp/capabilities.json → exit 0
2. ls src/data/capabilities/*.json | wc -l → 57
3. ls src/data/canonical-keys/*.json | wc -l → 12 (or actual count from canonical_keys section)
4. bun astro sync → exit 0
5. bun run build → exit 0
6. curl http://localhost:4321/reference/canonical-keys/display-name/ → 200
7. curl http://localhost:4321/reference/capabilities-matrix/ → 200
8. grep "ProviderExtensions" src/content/docs/using-syllago/providers/amp.mdx → pass
9. grep "MetaBox" src/content/docs/reference/canonical-keys/display-name.mdx → pass
10. grep "CanonicalSupportTable" src/content/docs/reference/canonical-keys/display-name.mdx → pass

**Dependencies:** T6, T7, T8, T9
**Plan ref:** docs/plans/2026-04-12-syllago-docs-capabilities-pipeline-implementation.md § T10
close_reason: Final validation: build passes (159 pages), all 10 success criteria met, all internal links valid

title: T7: Add capabilities matrix MDX generation to sync-capabilities.ts
description:
Extend scripts/sync-capabilities.ts to generate the capabilities-matrix.mdx reference page.

**Repo:** syllago-docs
**File:** scripts/sync-capabilities.ts (modify)

**What to do:**
Add generateCapabilitiesMatrix() function after generateCanonicalKeyPages() and call it from main().

The function:
1. Gets sorted provider slugs from manifest.providers
2. Builds MDX content:
   - Frontmatter: title "Capabilities Matrix", description about cross-provider support
   - AUTO-GENERATED comment
   - Intro paragraph and generated-date line
   - One table per content type in canonical_keys:
     * H2 heading: capitalized content type name
     * Header row: | Key | provider1 | provider2 | ...
     * Separator row with :---: alignment for provider columns
     * Data rows: key as link to /reference/canonical-keys/{slug}/, then ✓ or ✗ or — per provider
3. ## See Also section with links to Providers Overview and Compare Providers
4. Writes to src/content/docs/reference/capabilities-matrix.mdx

Key slug: keyName.replace(/_/g, "-")
Provider cell value: ✓ if mapping.supported, ✗ if not supported, — if no provider entry for that contentType

Update main() to add after generateCanonicalKeyPages(manifest):
  generateCapabilitiesMatrix(manifest);

See exact function in plan § T7 — copy verbatim.

title: T6: Add canonical key MDX generation to sync-capabilities.ts
description:
Extend scripts/sync-capabilities.ts to generate per-canonical-key MDX reference pages.

**Repo:** syllago-docs
**File:** scripts/sync-capabilities.ts (modify)

**What to do:**
Add three things to sync-capabilities.ts:

1. buildIssueUrl() helper (after config constants):
   Encodes a pre-filled GitHub new-issue URL with title "[capmon] Incorrect capability data: {contentType}/{keyName}" and body including key, contentType, generated_at date, and placeholder for description.

2. generateCanonicalKeyPage() function:
   Computes MetaBox props from the manifest:
   - totalProviders = count of all provider slugs
   - providerSupportCount = count of providers that support this key in this contentType
   - sourceCount = count of unique source URIs across all providers for this contentType
   - lastChangedAt = most recent last_changed_at across all providers for this contentType (fallback: manifest.generated_at)
   - issueUrl = buildIssueUrl(keyName, contentType, manifest.generated_at)
   
   Generates MDX content with:
   - Frontmatter: title (keyName), description (first sentence of meta.description)
   - AUTO-GENERATED comment
   - Imports for MetaBox and CanonicalSupportTable (relative path: ../../../../components/...)
   - <MetaBox .../> component call with all props
   - meta.description paragraph
   - **Type:** `{meta.type}` **Content type:** `{contentType}` line
   - ## Provider Support heading
   - <CanonicalSupportTable keyName="{keyName}" contentType="{contentType}" /> call

3. generateCanonicalKeyPages() function:
   Clears + recreates CANONICAL_KEYS_MDX_DIR, iterates manifest.canonical_keys, converts keyName underscores to hyphens for slug, writes {slug}.mdx.

4. Update main() — replace the placeholder console.log line with:
   writeCapabilitiesDataFiles(manifest);
   writeCanonicalKeysDataFiles(manifest);
   generateCanonicalKeyPages(manifest);
   // generateCapabilitiesMatrixPage added in T7

See exact function bodies in plan § T6 — copy verbatim.

**Success criteria:**
- bun scripts/sync-capabilities.ts --local /tmp/capabilities.json → exit 0 (logs key page count)
- ls src/content/docs/reference/canonical-keys/*.mdx | wc -l → matches canonical_keys count in capabilities.json
- grep "MetaBox" src/content/docs/reference/canonical-keys/display-name.mdx → pass
- grep "CanonicalSupportTable" src/content/docs/reference/canonical-keys/display-name.mdx → pass
- bun astro build → exit 0
